ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Code of the department the employee works in */,
  "job_code" TEXT /* Code of the job position of the employee */,
  "union_code" TEXT /* Code of the union the employee belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee's employment was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_code FOREIGN KEY ("department_code") REFERENCES departments ("department_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_code FOREIGN KEY ("job_code") REFERENCES job_codes ("job_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_union_code FOREIGN KEY ("union_code") REFERENCES unions ("union_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "organization_group" TEXT /* Group associated with the organization */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  "head_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head FOREIGN KEY ("department_head") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_families" (
  "job_family_code" TEXT /* Code for the job family */,
  "job_family_name" TEXT /* Name of the job family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job family */,
  "minimum_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the job family */,
  "maximum_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the job family */,
  "overtime_eligibility" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the job family is eligible for overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_family_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_codes" (
  "job_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "job_family_code" TEXT /* Code of the job family the job belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or level of the job */,
  "step" TEXT /* Step within the grade */,
  "pay_scale" TEXT /* Pay scale for the job (e.g., hourly, salaried) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "unions" (
  "union_code" TEXT /* Code for the union */,
  "union_name" TEXT /* Name of the union */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the union */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current union contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current union contract */,
  "contract_document" TEXT /* URL or reference to the contract document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("union_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with this compensation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of compensation record */,
  "base_salary" REAL /* Base salary of the employee */,
  "overtime" REAL /* Overtime pay for the employee */,
  "other_salaries" REAL /* Other salary components */,
  "total_salary" REAL /* Total salary including base, overtime, and other components */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount for the employee */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission amount for the employee */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payment (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the benefits record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with these benefits */,
  "retirement" REAL /* Retirement contribution amount */,
  "health_dental" REAL /* Health and dental benefits amount */,
  "other_benefits" REAL /* Other benefits */,
  "total_benefits" REAL /* Total benefits combining retirement, health, and other benefits */,
  "life_insurance" REAL /* Amount of life insurance coverage */,
  "disability_insurance" REAL /* Amount of disability insurance coverage */,
  "vacation_days" INTEGER /* Number of vacation days allocated */,
  "sick_days" INTEGER /* Number of sick days allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_compensation" (
  "total_comp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the total compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with this total compensation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the total compensation record */,
  "total_salary" REAL /* Total salary of the employee */,
  "total_benefits" REAL /* Total benefits of the employee */,
  "total_compensation" REAL /* Total compensation calculated from salary and benefits */,
  "bonus_included" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the bonus is included in the total compensation */,
  "commission_included" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the commission is included in the total compensation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_comp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_compensation_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_compensation_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year record */,
  "year_type" TEXT /* Type of year (e.g., Calendar) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Actual year */,
  "is_fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is a fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_groups" (
  "group_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the organization group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization group */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated to the organization group */,
  "head_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the organization group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment status record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with this status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in employment status */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_status_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_status_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the salary history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with this salary */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the salary record */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount for the year */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payment (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefit_history" (
  "benefit_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the benefit history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with this benefit */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the benefit record */,
  "benefit_amount" REAL /* Benefit amount for the year */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, retirement, life insurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefit_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
